productDisplayName: Being Human Women White Silicon Strap Stones Watch
description: Uber cool and stylish, this limited edition analogue wrist watch from Bollywood superstar Salman Khan's NGO, being human, is designed for the fashion forward. Stylish to the T with a sporty look, it's a great addition to your wardrobe.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: Round Stainless steel case with rubber strap for enhanced durability, comfort and style Rubber strap in linked-chain style and ridged on the inside for enhanced durability, comfort and style Butterfly clasp for easy use Fixed stainless steel ridged bezel in gold colour studded with white stones for a royal look Luminous hands and index markings for visibility in low light conditions Rose gold metallic dial, with circular ridges on middle circle for durability and style Metallic hands with red seconds hand, and red and black index markings for easy visibility and style
